subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 750303285/241011066 is not a GRB
body:
Matt Godwin (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 750303285/241011066 at 01:34:40.10 UT
on 11 October 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
